doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The document claims to authorize unsupervised paralegal drafting of legal motions without pre-filing attorney review and waive unauthorized practice prohibitions, contradicting California Bar ethics rules that no legitimate State Bar protoc
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 88
REASON: The document purports to authorize paralegals to draft legal motions without pre-filing attorney review, which directly contradicts California's unauthorized practice of law statutes (B&P §6125) and State Bar ethics rules that the document itself claims to waive—a structural implausibility that real institutional guidance would never create.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 88
REASON: The document claims to authorize unsupervised paralegal drafting of legal motions without pre-filing attorney review and waive unauthorized practice prohibitions, contradicting California Bar ethics rules that no legitimate State Bar protocol would override.
